title: Data Flow Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger data flow foundations judgment so ai / automation work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Data Flow Foundations is a leverage point inside ai / automation. It supports the broader goal of workflow automation, copilots, agentic systems, and leverage through tooling.
coreConcepts: Data Flow Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good data flow foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Data Flow Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
